caption: The video captures a formal session in what appears to be a legislative assembly or parliament. The scene is filled with individuals dressed in traditional and formal attire, seated in rows of wooden benches with microphones in front of them, suggesting that speeches or discussions are taking place. The attendees are mostly men, with a few women visible, all appearing attentive and engaged. Some members are seen listening intently, while others are looking around or adjusting their positions. The setting is well-lit, with a sense of order and decorum, indicative of an important governmental proceeding. The atmosphere conveys a serious and focused environment as the participants partake in the proceedings.
